page: Amazon Web Services m8idn.32xlarge is an x86_64 architecture general-purpose server powered by Intel processors. It features 128 virtual CPUs mapped to 64 physical cores with 2.0 threads per core, operating at a clock speed of 3.9 GHz. The system is equipped with 512.0 GB of dedicated system memory, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

This instance includes 7600 GB of local NVMe SSD storage, offering high-speed, low-latency data access directly on the host. It is optimized for both network and Elastic Block Store performance, delivering a baseline network bandwidth of 200 Gbps. The underlying virtualization is managed by the AWS Nitro hypervisor, ensuring minimal virtualization overhead and dedicated resource allocation.

Given its balanced compute-to-memory ratio, high-capacity local NVMe storage, and high-speed networking, the m8idn.32xlarge is suited for demanding workloads. These include large-scale databases, data-intensive applications, high-throughput network appliances, and general-purpose enterprise applications requiring substantial local temporary storage and high network performance. The hardware configuration offers qualitative cost efficiency by consolidating high-density compute, massive local storage, and high-speed networking into a single instance.
description: Amazon Web Services m8idn.32xlarge is a general-purpose, network- and EBS-optimized server built on the x86_64 architecture. Powered by Intel processors running at 3.9 GHz, it delivers 128 vCPUs across 64 physical cores and is equipped with 512.0 GB of dedicated memory. The instance features 7600 GB of local NVMe SSD storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 200 Gbps, managed by the AWS Nitro hypervisor. This configuration provides a balanced resource profile with high-speed local storage and high network throughput. It is designed for enterprise applications, large-scale databases, and network-intensive workloads that require substantial local storage capacity and high-bandwidth data transfers without the need for dedicated GPU acceleration.
og_description: Amazon Web Services m8idn.32xlarge is an x86_64 general-purpose server featuring 128 vCPUs, 512 GB RAM, 7600 GB of local NVMe SSD storage, and 200 Gbps network bandwidth powered by Intel processors.
meta_description: Amazon Web Services m8idn.32xlarge is an x86_64 server with 128 vCPUs, 512 GB RAM, 7600 GB NVMe SSD, and 200 Gbps network bandwidth.
tagline: A high-bandwidth general-purpose server featuring dedicated Intel processors, massive local NVMe SSD storage, and high-speed networking.
bullet_points: 128 vCPUs and 64 physical Intel cores running at 3.9 GHz
7600 GB of high-speed local NVMe SSD storage
200 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with Nitro hypervisor
Well-suited for large-scale databases and network-intensive workloads
